story.iWant: a catalog directory with a structured manifest file
story.soThat: templates are discoverable and have rich metadata for agent decision-making

tasks.task: Create initial `catalog.json` with empty templates array and metadata
Remove references to `config/samples/` and `config/templates/` in CONVENTIONS.md

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given the catalog infrastructure is created, when I check `.slide-builder/config/catalog/`, then it exists with a `catalog.json` file
Given catalog.json exists, when I read it, then it follows the defined schema with version, generated, lastModified, and templates array
Given CONVENTIONS.md is updated, when I read it, then it documents the catalog structure and replaces samples/templates references

doc.title: Technical Specification: Template Catalog System
doc.snippet: Defines catalog.json schema with id, name, description, use_cases, file, preview, created_at, source fields. Template IDs use kebab-case slugs.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: Documents current config/ structure with samples/ and templates/ directories. Follows BMAD-mirror pattern with workflow.yaml + instructions.md.

doc.title: Slide Builder Conventions
doc.snippet: Current structure shows config/samples/ and config/templates/ directories. This file needs updating to document new catalog structure.

artifact.reason: Contains 8 sample HTML files to be consolidated into catalog. Will be deprecated.
Contains layout templates including viewer-template.html and layout-rocd-initiative.html. To be deprecated.
Current templates tracking section will need updating in future stories to reference catalog.
Documents current directory structure with samples/ and templates/. Must be updated to show new catalog/ structure.

constraints.constraint: catalog.json must follow exact schema: version (string), generated (ISO date), lastModified (ISO timestamp), templates array
Template IDs use kebab-case slugs (e.g., "process-flow", not "processFlow" or "Process Flow")
Use ISO 8601 timestamps for dates (YYYY-MM-DD for dates, full ISO for timestamps)
Follow BMAD workflow patterns - YAML config, Markdown instructions
This story creates infrastructure ONLY - no templates or migration. Empty templates array is expected.

tests.standards: No automated test framework. Manual validation via file inspection and JSON schema compliance. Verify files exist, JSON parses correctly, and CONVENTIONS.md accurately documents new structure.

ideas.idea: Verify catalog.json file exists in catalog directory
Parse catalog.json and verify all required fields present: version, generated, lastModified, templates
Verify templates array is empty (no templates yet - infrastructure only)
Verify CONVENTIONS.md contains catalog documentation section
Verify no references to config/samples/ remain in CONVENTIONS.md
Verify no references to config/templates/ remain in CONVENTIONS.md
